response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable polyglot engineer with genuine scale experience and solid fundamentals, but the role demands deep, specialized expertise in experimentation platforms, telemetry infrastructure, feature-flagging systems, statistical bias detection, and rollout-risk management — none of which appear anywhere in his resume. His career trajectory is as a senior full-stack and infrastructure engineer, and there is no evidence of the Principal/IC6-level cross-team platform architecture leadership this position requires.
strengths: Broad language coverage (TypeScript, C++, Java, C#, DLang) satisfies the technical breadth requirement
Demonstrated high-throughput scale experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async systems
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) aligns with the preferred AI-tooling accelerator criterion
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience: no A/B testing, feature flagging, experiment assignment/targeting, or rollout-risk management is mentioned anywhere
No evidence of telemetry pipelines, metrics infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis work — the data aptitude core of this role is entirely absent
Recent and current titles are 'Senior Software Developer'; no demonstrated Principal/IC6 scope of cross-team architectural ownership or multi-workstream technical leadership

key_factors.factor: No metrics or telemetry infrastructure experience
